title: Mock High DUI for Marijuana test #2 before getting blood drawn

enrichment.summary: Kyle documents a self-conducted mock marijuana DUI experiment: he smokes one full gram of 21% indica over about 90 minutes, then drives to a clinic in the Colorado mountains, performs roadside sobriety field tests (walk-the-line, one-leg stand, tree pose) on camera, and gets blood drawn to record his THC level. The goal is to generate scientific baseline data on his impairment at a known dose.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: wants objective, reproducible data — emphasizes exact dose (1g, 21%) and precise timing as 'scientific'
acknowledges he is 'pretty stoked' but presents his performance on the tests matter-of-factly, without alarm

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle smoked half of a gram of 21% THC weed, which was the strongest strain available.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle smoked approximately 20 to 40 hits of weed but couldn't remember the exact count.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle plans to smoke an entire gram of 21% THC weed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle conducted a scientific test to measure the effects of smoking a gram of weed.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle smoked conservatively over the course of an hour.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle finished smoking a gram of weed at 11:47 AM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle waited 53 minutes after smoking to take a blood test.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle performed a walking test, including walking in a straight line and standing on one leg for 30 seconds.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes talking should be part of the impairment test.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle drove a route that included Netherland, Central City, South Park, and Trail Ridge Road, covering approximately 308 miles and 40,000 feet of elevation.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle smoked a gram of 21% THC OG Push Indica weed from 10:30 AM to 12:00 PM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle had his blood drawn an hour after smoking and took another hour to return for the test.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle conducted the test scientifically by smoking exactly one gram of weed and waiting an hour before testing.
